stories.headline: Markets are pricing in over 50% chance of a Fed rate hike by January due to tightening risks.
stories.body:
RATE HIKE BETS SURGE IN MARKETS

US interest rate futures now show more than a 50% chance of a Fed rate hike by January, according to Kalshi pricing.

Markets have shifted sharply from near-zero odds to actively pricing in tightening risk as early as 2026, with a 34% probability of a hike before 2027.

stories.headline: Joe Rogan expresses deep concern for Theo Von's mental health struggles on his podcast.
stories.body:
Joe Rogan just took time out of his podcast to express genuine concern for his friend Theo Von.

He admitted that some of Von’s recent behavior after getting on SSRIs “freaks me out” — especially his comments about suicide.

ROGAN: “Theo Von’s going through the exact same thing and last time he was on the podcast he was explaining it to me.”

“It freaks me out because I know Theo has had conversations before...like even publicly.”

“He had a Netflix taping and it didn’t go well. It was like they actually never...they shelved it. They never used it.”

“And you know there was all these stories from people that were there saying he bombed. I think he just had a kind of a breakdown.”

“And when he was talking to the crowd and there’s a video of it, he said, you know, the people were saying, hey, we still love you.”

“He goes, thank you. Look, I’m just I’m trying not to take my own life.”

“And like you hear stuff like that and you just go like, oh, Jesus Christ.”

“I’ve known too many people that I didn’t think were going to kill themselves and then did.”

“And then he goes down these spirals where he starts talking about world events and freaking out. I’m like, oh, Jesus Christ! Like, I got to help this dude.”

stories.headline: Lex Fridman announces a spontaneous worldwide backpacking adventure starting in China.
stories.body:
I'm traveling the world for a bit, starting with China but then hopping around the globe, anywhere. Open to any adventure. No plans, only a backpack. Hoping to meet & get to know humans from all walks of life. The pic is from a long hike on the Great Wall. For me, as a fan of history, this was an epic experience.

In China, first I'm visiting a few big cities & talking to engineers at the heart of China's AI revolution. After that, if feeling crazy enough, I'm hitchhiking (first time) across rural China for a few weeks. Hitchhiking because I think it's the best way to meet rural folks who I would otherwise never get the chance to meet. I hope to do the same in US and other places.

I have a request, if you have a travel recommendation, fill out the form(s) below if you feel like it. Or share with folks who might have advice about such travel.

Form 1 - travel recommendation:
If you can, recommend to me an interesting place I should visit anywhere in the world. For this, fill out form 1. Not touristy stuff, but something off the beaten path, that tourists may not know about, but is legendary. It could be as remote as meeting a herder in the mountains who is a local legend. Asia, Middle East, Europe, India, South/North America, Africa, Australia, anywhere. In China, I'm hoping to visit maybe Heibei, Shanxi, Shaanxi, Gansu, Sichuan, Yunnan, etc, so recommendations for spots to visit are helpful.

Form 2 - coffee:
If you want to grab a coffee with me anywhere in the world, fill out form 2 (please don't use form 1 for that).

Anyway, I hectically tossed stuff in backpack. Realizing I don't have a clear plan of any kind, which is probably the only way to do it. LFG.

Love you all ❤️

stories.headline: Joe Rogan challenges Palantir CEO Alex Karp's support for mandatory national service post-Iran war.
stories.body:
ALERT: Joe Rogan says “F*ck you, you go” to Palantir after CEO Alex Karp argued that national service should be mandatory.

“I don’t understand why anybody would wanna support that… That sounds crazy. Especially after this Iran war, where everybody’s like why the f*ck are we in Iran?”

“How ’bout let’s figure out a way to use your technology so there’s no more wars? Wouldn’t that be a better goal?”

stories.headline: NASA develops cryocooler technology to simulate extreme lunar conditions for testing construction materials.
stories.body:
To build on the Moon, we need construction materials that can withstand bitter cold – so @NASAglenn invented a machine that can recreate that environment for testing!

This high-powered refrigerator, or cryocooler, removes heat without using any liquid. https://www.nasa.gov/general/nasa-technology-mimics-extreme-lunar-night/?utm_source=TWITTER&utm_medium=NASA&utm_campaign=NASASocial&linkId=942672932

stories.headline: Newport Beach operates 16 oil wells generating over $1.2 million annually while California pushes to eliminate fossil fuels.
stories.body:
The City of Newport Beach in California owns 16 oil wells

They produce over 21,000 barrels per year. The city makes about $1.2 million per year f

California says we have to get rid of fossil fuels to fight change change, but California cities are profiting from oil production

Ironically the city of Newport has opposed new offshore drilling but keeps pumping from their own wells and making money

The hypocrisy of Democrats never ends

stories.headline: Alleged deep state plans to use media propaganda to destabilize Indian government through fake news and protests.
stories.body: It's very clear seeing the leading signals on social media: Every news, and more fake news, are going to be used by the DS to instigate Indians against the PM and GoI in the coming months. It's going to be a barrage, no a deluge, of negative news (mainly Reuters, Bloomberg, WSJ, FT) and propaganda to try disillusion the most hardcore supporters. To prepare the base for protests and anarchy to try create govt instability in India. But they will fail in the end. Because these losers, the communists and islamists, don't get India.

stories.headline: Uri Geller speculates that UFO disclosures may reveal humanity's extraterrestrial origins.
stories.body:
🚨 THE UFO FILES MAY REVEAL SOMETHING FAR BIGGER THAN ALIENS… THEY MAY REVEAL THE TRUE STORY OF HUMANITY 👽📜

Friends… I want you to prepare yourselves psychologically for what may be coming next.

Because I do NOT believe the future UFO/UAP disclosures that the Pentagon are in the process of releasing are simply about videos and sightings of advanced craft.

I believe they may ultimately force humanity to confront a terrifying & beautiful possibility:

That WE may not be entirely “from Earth.”

Now before sceptics laugh — understand this:

Scientists are already openly discussing PANSPERMIA — the theory that life itself may have arrived here via asteroids, comets or cosmic debris.

And if life came from elsewhere then WE are part of that cosmic lineage.

But here's the thing: humans are an ANOMALY!

We are physically fragile compared to many animals.

Yet somehow we became dominant over the entire planet!

We create art, technology, religion, civilisations, AI & spacecraft.

And unlike every other species, we also store information OUTSIDE our genetics - creating what some scientists call a “dataome” - which we pass on to future generations e.g. all our communications, art, scientific knowledge & cultural artifacts

It's almost as if humanity was designed to EVOLVE through consciousness itself.

Could that be accidental?

Or were we guided?

Modified?

SEEDED?

I believe there are people inside governments who already know the answers to some of these questions.

And I believe this is one reason why disclosure has been delayed for DECADES.

Because the implications are not just scientific — they are spiritual, political & civilisational.

There are even persistent rumours that senior religious figures, including the VATICAN & the POPE, have quietly been briefed behind closed doors in preparation for future revelations.

Why would that happen unless world governments know the TRUTH will deeply affect our shared understanding of who we are?

I believe we may discover that our true HOME is far beyond the stars & WE are ALIEN to earth.

And that THEY have been watching, guiding and genetically ENGINEERING us from the very beginning!

#Aliens #Disclosure #UFO
